creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text: This port expired a few days ago. There has been no feedback from the maintainer in over a month. Also this port is restricted to Python 2.7 which after years of warnings expired upstream at the start of this year, and the attached patch does not make this port compatible with a supported version of Python. As furthermore this port is a leaf port, it has been removed. Feel free to re-port a version of Cinelerra-GG which uses a supported version of Python.
